input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

A dark blurry vertical object appears on the far right edge. Lighting changes significantly from overexposed white to natural daylight conditions.</think><answer></answer>

At eight seconds, foreground hands hold a white smartphone horizontally to capture a laughing group of friends outdoors, with the screen showing the live feed. The provided evidence does not contain information regarding a final speaker appearing at fourteen seconds.

The provided evidence concludes at the fourteen-second mark with an over-the-shoulder view of hands holding a white smartphone. The illuminated screen displays a group of friends sitting together outdoors against a blurred background of a wooden fence and greenery. A thin white bracelet is visible on the right wrist holding the device. There is no information in the available clips regarding a man identified as Dan Riccio or any final speaker appearing on screen to talk.

From fourteen to twenty-two seconds, the scene shifts to a man with short grey hair and a brown t-shirt against a white background. Initially identified by on-screen text as Dan Riccio, he faces slightly right with his mouth open. Over the next few seconds, the text overlay disappears while he continues speaking, alternating between open and closed mouth positions. His expression remains engaged throughout this sequence, marking the final visible actions in the provided evidence.

From twenty-two to twenty-six seconds, the video cuts to an extreme close-up of the smartphone's rear upper corner. A gold band sits atop a white panel featuring a black camera lens, microphone, and flash. Initially, the black lens visually transforms into a simple white circle outline to emphasize the module's placement. The view then remains fixed on these hardware details against a white background with consistent lighting, highlighting the pill-shaped flash and metallic curves without further graphical overlays.

By four seconds, the perspective shifts to the front of a white device displaying a camera interface focused on succulents. At eight seconds, foreground hands hold a white smartphone horizontally to capture a laughing group of friends outdoors, with the screen showing the live feed. The provided evidence does not contain information regarding a final speaker appearing at fourteen seconds.

The provided evidence concludes at the fourteen-second mark with an over-the-shoulder view of hands holding a white smartphone. The illuminated screen displays a group of friends sitting together outdoors against a blurred background of a wooden fence and greenery. A thin white bracelet is visible on the right wrist holding the device. There is no information in the available clips regarding a man identified as Dan Riccio or any final speaker appearing on screen to talk.

From fourteen to twenty-two seconds, the scene shifts to a man with short grey hair and a brown t-shirt against a white background. Initially identified by on-screen text as Dan Riccio, he faces slightly right with his mouth open. Over the next few seconds, the text overlay disappears while he continues speaking, alternating between open and closed mouth positions. His expression remains engaged throughout this sequence, marking the final visible actions in the provided evidence.

From twenty-two to twenty-six seconds, the video cuts to an extreme close-up of the smartphone's rear upper corner. A gold band sits atop a white panel featuring a black camera lens, microphone, and flash. Initially, the black lens visually transforms into a simple white circle outline to emphasize the module's placement. The view then remains fixed on these hardware details against a white background with consistent lighting, highlighting the pill-shaped flash and metallic curves without further graphical overlays.

From twenty-eight to thirty seconds, the extreme close-up of the smartphone's rear corner persists. A semi-transparent schematic overlay becomes clearer, revealing detailed technical line drawings around the black camera lens and pill-shaped flash. White graphical lines illustrate internal components against the gold band and white panel background, highlighting the device's engineering without further scene changes.

samples.output: <think>The view transitions from a finger selecting 'SQUARE' mode on a smartphone screen to the full outdoor pool scene. Several people sit along the pool's edge, including a woman in a neon green top raising her arms. A man dives into the water from the upper left corner, entering the frame mid-air.</think><answer></answer>

Text displays "Craig Federighi Senior Vice President Software Engineering". He speaks to the camera; the text overlay disappears. [68-70] The scene cuts to an outdoor evening setting with hanging Edison bulbs with glowing filaments. In the background, a person holds a smartphone horizontally, appearing to take a photo amidst green foliage and soft lights.

[70-72] Focus pulls from lights to a man with curly reddish hair holding a gold smartphone. [72-76] The screen shows a camera interface in "Photo" mode with "VIDEO" and "SQUARE" text, framing a group dining outdoors. [76-80] The interface disappears, replaced by a four-panel grid that zooms and transitions into a single high-resolution photo of the group at a long wooden table under hanging lights. [84-88] A woman with long dark hair in a dark patterned top holds a gold smartphone horizontally, smiling. [90-92] Three people—a woman in white, a man in a yellow plaid shirt with glasses, and a woman in a patterned top—smile behind the cake. Foreground hands hold a smartphone displaying the group on its screen. [92-96] The woman holding the gold phone activates the LED flash, which illuminates brightly then turns off. She smiles in the blurred background, gripping the device steadily. [96-98] A white smartphone with gold edges is shown horizontally. Its screen displays the photo of the three people leaning on a wooden table with a white plate and yellow utensils.

[98-106] A white smartphone screen displays a photograph of three smiling individuals: a man in a yellow plaid shirt standing behind two women, one in a dark blue top with blue earrings and another in a beige knit top, set against a dark background with string lights. The camera zooms in progressively until the photograph fills the entire frame, removing the device bezel. [106-112] The image fades to white and cuts to a sunny outdoor lawn where a man in a light green shirt and dark shorts crouches on the right, holding a smartphone horizontally. To the left, a blue and yellow water slide sits on the grass. In the background, blurred figures move near the slide as water sprays into the air during the outdoor activity.

[122-124] A finger touches a smartphone screen displaying camera options "VIDEO" and "SQUARE". The frame counter changes from 013 to 022. The screen shows a pool scene where water splashes up near people sitting on the edge, capturing the motion.

Several people sit along the pool's edge, including a woman in a neon green top raising her arms. A man dives into the water from the upper left corner, entering the frame mid-air.

queries.question: Describe the sequence of visible actions involving the smartphone and the final speaker.

answers.text: At two seconds, hands hold a gold smartphone horizontally against a bright blue sky. By four seconds, the perspective shifts to the front of a white device displaying a camera interface focused on succulents. At eight seconds, foreground hands hold a white smartphone horizontally to capture a laughing group of friends outdoors, with the screen showing the live feed. The provided evidence does not contain information regarding a final speaker appearing at fourteen seconds.

The provided evidence concludes at the fourteen-second mark with an over-the-shoulder view of hands holding a white smartphone. The illuminated screen displays a group of friends sitting together outdoors against a blurred background of a wooden fence and greenery. A thin white bracelet is visible on the right wrist holding the device. There is no information in the available clips regarding a man identified as Dan Riccio or any final speaker appearing on screen to talk.

From fourteen to twenty-two seconds, the scene shifts to a man with short grey hair and a brown t-shirt against a white background. Initially identified by on-screen text as Dan Riccio, he faces slightly right with his mouth open. Over the next few seconds, the text overlay disappears while he continues speaking, alternating between open and closed mouth positions. His expression remains engaged throughout this sequence, marking the final visible actions in the provided evidence.

From twenty-two to twenty-six seconds, the video cuts to an extreme close-up of the smartphone's rear upper corner. A gold band sits atop a white panel featuring a black camera lens, microphone, and flash. Initially, the black lens visually transforms into a simple white circle outline to emphasize the module's placement. The view then remains fixed on these hardware details against a white background with consistent lighting, highlighting the pill-shaped flash and metallic curves without further graphical overlays.

From twenty-eight to thirty seconds, the extreme close-up of the smartphone's rear corner persists. A semi-transparent schematic overlay becomes clearer, revealing detailed technical line drawings around the black camera lens and pill-shaped flash. White graphical lines illustrate internal components against the gold band and white panel background, highlighting the device's engineering without further scene changes.

From thirty to thirty-eight seconds, the view rapidly zooms into the black camera lens, transitioning to a digital schematic with green concentric rings. A blue square sensor appears deep within the aperture before the perspective shifts entirely to a square sensor chip on a black background. Cyan lines outline the component while its surface displays a purple-to-pink gradient. Finally, the camera zooms tightly on this gradient surface, pushing the schematic lines to the periphery as the view holds still.
